case_title: MISSION DENTAL HEALTH VS LOPEZ, JOSE

docket_entries.description: SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT LOPEZ, JOSE

SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION JUL-08-2005, CONTINUED BY COURT TO DEC-30-2005 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506 SETTLEMENT BETWEEN THE PARTIES FOR A TOTAL AMOUNT OF $580.10. IF NO APPEARANCES, CASE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. PAYMENTS ARE TO BE MADE AT THE RATE OF $114 PER MONTH BEGINNING ON JULY 20, 2005 AND ON
THE 30TH DAY OF EACH MONTH THEREAFTER UNTIL PAID IN FULL. IF ANY PAYMENT IS MISSED, THE ENTIRE BALANCE BECOMES DUE IMMEDIATELY.
THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE AS TO DEFENDANT LOPEZ, JOSE NO APPEARANCES. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
